zh.lifeSummary: Mary Parker於1546年出生在英國艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德。她於1560年4月21日與William Whitby在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾利費爾德 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年在她的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Parker于1546年出生在英国艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德。她于1560年4月21日与William Whitby在英国英格兰斯塔福爾利費爾德 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年在她的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Parker was born in 1546, in Great Burstead, Essex, England. She married William Whitby on 21 April 1560, in Lichfield St Mary, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1584, in her hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Essex, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1584, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Essex, Angleterre.

ja.Saint Mary,Stafford,Stafford,England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Parkerは1546年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ブルステアドで生まれた。1560年4月21日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアリチフィールド スト マリーでWilliam Whitbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary, Stafford, England: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리ch필드 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Parker(은)는 1546년 영국 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1560년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리ch필드 스트 메리에서 William Whitby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 그녀의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Parker nasceu em 1546, em Great Burstead, Essex, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Whitby em 21 de abril de 1560, em Lichfield St Mary, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1584, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Mary, Stafford, England: личфиелд ст мэри, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Parker родилась в 1546 г. в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Whitby 21 апреля 1560 г. в местности личфиелд ст мэри, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1584 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности эссекс, Англия.
